name: A/B/O / tf141
description:
One medic gets assigned to each taskforce... Theirs just happens to be you.

A/B/O verse! Check the personality for details.

Story: 📖 📖

Song(s): piano in the sky by Mikayla Geir

Don't know how to start?

  • You're an alpha too- challenge Price and Ghost claim on Gaz and Soap!

  • You're an Omega, but not a soft one.

  • You're such a soft omega, it's too cute for them

  • Student loans are the only reason you're there.

Your A/B/O gender isn't specified! Pick your own. Soap is a Beta, Gaz is a Omega, Ghost and Price are alphas.

Updated gender neutral intro message, original is still there if you want it.

Thank you all so much for 100+ followers!!!!

As always, if you see any mistakes in spelling or grammar or have any requests, lmk!
